label: Transparent Birch Bark motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Birch Bark transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated birch bark motif for a design-system catalog, no surrounding forest scene, no props, no text.
Subject: A clean editorial cutout of curled white birch bark sheets with layered papery edges, charcoal-black lenticel scars, fine grey-brown bark grain, a few small attached fresh birch leaves in natural leaf green, and subtle boreal forest neutral moss flecks. Accurate birch bark material, tactile paper-like peeling layers, crisp silhouette edges, opaque subject suitable for background removal.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show an elegant overlapping vertical-and-diagonal bark cluster from a slightly elevated three-quarter view; do not crop any bark curls or leaves.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white bark highlights, black scars, soft grey-brown grain, leaf green accents, and clean editorial calm.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no full tree trunk, no forest landscape, no sky, no animals, no insects, no hands, no tools, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Birch Bark" / "Birch Bark", derived from the provided birch bark cutout already visible in context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif image. The board must visibly respect white papery birch bark, charcoal-black scars/lenticels, warm inner bark beige, leaf green accents, pale lichen, and boreal forest neutral greys.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Birch Bark", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use clean editorial product typography, refined sans UI, quiet serif-like display rhythm only as an accent, restrained numeric hierarchy, and Japanese typography guidance for calm labels and compact data.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise editorial grid, clean operational dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, crisp black hairline dividers like birch scars, white paper surfaces, restrained leaf-green focus states.
Color palette: white bark background, charcoal-black ink and scars, pale bark grey surfaces, warm inner bark beige, leaf green primary accent, deep spruce/forest neutral, lichen grey-green, frost white highlights. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Visual details: horizontal lenticel line motifs, torn papery bark edge dividers, subtle lichen texture, leaf-vein micro icons, editorial whitespace, clean data tables, measured status colors derived from green/black/beige only.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Birch Bark" / "Birch Bark" design-system board, translated from the birch bark motif cutout and the light board already visible in context. It must feel like the same system in dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent birch bark motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, clean editorial component language, horizontal scar-line texture, spacing, typography, 8px radii, and shadcn/tweakcn operational UI mood.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Birch Bark", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep the same clean editorial product typography, refined sans UI, restrained display accent, and compact Japanese data guidance from the light board.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from charcoal scars and deep spruce forest neutral, light text from white bark, cards in soot black and bark graphite, primary leaf green focus states, beige inner-bark secondary surfaces, lichen muted states, white bark hairline dividers, subtle torn bark texture overlays, horizontal lenticel separators, crisp 8px cards and controls.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise editorial grid, calm operational dashboard, clean dark mode rather than marketing page.
Color palette: charcoal-black background, white bark foreground, spruce dark panels, leaf green primary accent, lichen grey-green muted text, warm inner bark beige warning/secondary, bark grey borders. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
